title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 253.165 - Vehicles in parks subject to general law regulating such vehicles
text:
253.165.  Vehicles in parks subject to general law regulating such vehicles. — All motor vehicles operated upon any park thoroughfare are subject to the provisions concerning motor vehicles contained in chapters 300, 301, 302, 303, 304 and 307, not inconsistent with sections 253.150 to 253.170.
(L. 1971 H.B. 299 § 4)
